summary: High-risk RFQ relative to historical seat-side reinforcement family. Quality level, tolerance, inspection scope, freight terms, payment terms, and annual price-down are all above family norm.
recommended_actions: Add explicit PPAP Level 5, run-at-rate, and annual revalidation cost lines.
Escalate DDP Monterrey freight and Net 120 payment terms for management approval.
Separate gauge investment from base tooling and validate capability on +/-0.03 mm hole pitch.
Do not submit without packaging rack cycle-cost assumption.
